archimate:Assessment.name: Delegation of Powers Provisioning Digital Public Services
archimate:Assessment.documentation:
Definition: Delegation of Powers Provisioning Digital Public Services ABB is an Assessment representing the extent to which the digital public service delivery is delegated to lower public administrative tiers or to private organisations acting on behalf of the public administration.
Source: Scientific Foundations of Digital Governance and Transformation
Source reference: https://books.google.gr/books?id=IB5iEAAAQBAJ&pg=PA298&lpg=PA298&dq=Delegation+of+Powers+Provisioning+Digital+Public+Services&source=bl&ots=jyuzPhj0Q8&sig=ACfU3U1-hD4udfrf3Ye_7Ywly0FATpCu6Q&hl=el&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjHhuyQ-KT3AhUEt6QKHTNbCCwQ6AF6BAgPEAM#v=onepage&q=Delegation%20of%20Powers%20Provisioning%20Digital%20Public%20Services&f=false
Example: The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): OECD Designing and Delivering public services in the digital age (https://goingdigital.oecd.org/data/notes/No22_ToolkitNote_DigitalGovernment.pdf)
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Legal view
Viewpoint: Highlevel viewpoint
Interoperability Saliency: The Delegation of Powers provisioning Digital Public Services ABB is salient for the legal interoperability due to it enables (i) the delegation of powers to local authorities to implement rules and metrics to monitor the digital public services; and (ii) the establishment of rules to balance the digital public services consumption.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DelegationOfPowersProvisioningDigitalPublicServicesAssessment
ABB name: eira:DelegationOfPowersProvisioningDigitalPublicServicesAssessment
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DelegationOfPowersProvisioningDigitalPublicServicesAssessment
Interoperability Layer: Legal

properties.value: Delegation of Powers Provisioning Digital Public Services ABB is an Assessment representing the extent to which the digital public service delivery is delegated to lower public administrative tiers or to private organisations acting on behalf of the public administration.
Scientific Foundations of Digital Governance and Transformation

The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): OECD Designing and Delivering public services in the digital age (https://goingdigital.oecd.org/data/notes/No22_ToolkitNote_DigitalGovernment.pdf)

The Delegation of Powers provisioning Digital Public Services ABB is salient for the legal interoperability due to it enables (i) the delegation of powers to local authorities to implement rules and metrics to monitor the digital public services; and (ii) the establishment of rules to balance the digital public services consumption.
Enterprise Architecture Framework alignment guidelines viewpoint
